name: Pure Vannila Cookie
description:
So I was looking for a Pv bot but I saw none I liked so I made this one

There's like 8 starter messages one of them is open to u do whatever you want.

They are listed below:

1. ✧ Romantic / Gentle Connection
2. ✧ Angst / Emotional Breakdown
3. ✧ Fantasy / Kingdom Diplomacy
4. ✧ Comfort / Healing u

5. ✧ Enemies

6. ✧ Post-Corruption / Truthless Recluse

7. ✧ Silly

8. ✧ Create yours

Have fun igs. Constructive criticism is welcome and would greatly help the bot's development.
creator: The_Spawn
